    Alle Klassen und Schnittstellen|Alle Packages|Serialisierte Form

    N

    name - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.request.DeviceCreateRequest
    Display name for the new device.
    name - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.request.DeviceRenameRequest
    New display name for the device.
    name - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.request.RoomRequest
    Display name of the room.
    name - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.request.RuleRequest
    Display name of the rule.
    name - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.request.SceneRequest
    Display name of the scene.
    name - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.request.ScheduleRequest
    Display name of the schedule.
    name - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.DeviceResponse
    Display name of the device.
    name - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.RoomResponse
    Display name of the room.
    name - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.RuleResponse
    Display name of the rule.
    name - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.SceneResponse
    Display name of the scene.
    name - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.ScheduleResponse
    Display name of the schedule.
    name - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.entity.Device
    Human-readable name of the device.
    name - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.entity.Room
    Display name of the room.
    name - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.entity.Rule
    Human-readable name for the rule (e.g., "Motion activates hallway light").
    name - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.entity.Scene
    Display name of the scene (e.g., "Movie Night").
    name - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.entity.Schedule
    Descriptive name for the schedule (e.g., "Morning Lights").
    Notification - Klasse in at.jku.se.entity
    An in-app notification sent to a user when a rule fires or fails (FR-12).
    Notification() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.entity.Notification
    Creates an empty entity; fields are populated before persisting.
    NotificationMapper - Klasse in at.jku.se.mapper
    Maps Notification entities to response DTOs.
    NotificationRepository - Klasse in at.jku.se.repository
    Repository for Notification entities.
    NotificationRepository() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.repository.NotificationRepository
    Creates the repository; intended for CDI instantiation.
    NotificationResource - Klasse in at.jku.se.resource
    REST resource for in-app notifications (FR-12).
    NotificationResource() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.resource.NotificationResource
    Creates the resource; intended for CDI instantiation.
    NotificationResponse - Klasse in at.jku.se.dto.response
    Response DTO for an in-app notification (FR-12).
    NotificationResponse() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.NotificationResponse
    Creates an empty response; fields are populated by the mapping layer.
